info.title: legacy-analyzer
info.description: AI-powered .NET code analyzer for understanding complex codebases, detecting technical debt, and generating actionable insights. Analyze local or remote repositories, generate documentation, and get AI-powered recommendations.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: System Understanding Agent - .NET Legacy Code Analysis Tool

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze a .NET solution and generate reports

commands.description: Analyze a solution from a remote Git repository

commands.description: Ask a question about the codebase

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Estimate migration effort to new framework
